title: Select future redundant ingress design
intent: Document a future LAN ingress architecture that remains reachable while Cube is offline, fits four 1 GB Pi workers, and does not install ingress in this phase.
proof_hooks: git diff --check; nix flake check --no-build --no-update-lock-file; nix develop --accept-flake-config -c ./scripts/validate-repo.sh; decapod validate
unknowns: No physical Pi resource measurements or LAN health-check behavior are available yet.
deferred_questions: Approve installation only after Day-0 physical verification and the documented Traefik resource/offline gates pass.
